text: Used this for a Quince last fall. Setup crew was on time, which is more than I can say for some places. Parking got tight by 7pm but manageable. Would book again.

Hands down the best banquet hall I've worked with for a Quinceañera. Clean, good AC — critical in November — and the staff actually understood what we needed without a lot of back-and-forth. Coordinator was sharp.
Solid venue. The main ballroom holds a big crowd without feeling cramped. They did give me the runaround on the deposit refund timeline but eventually sorted it. Décor package is worth the upgrade.
Best tamales at a catered event I've had since my mom's kitchen. Showed up with full setup, kept the chafing dishes hot all night. Pricing is fair for what you get.
Booked them for a big event with 180 guests. Every tray came out on time. Birria was a hit. Crew cleaned up without being asked twice. Will call them first for the next event.
Carmen and I picked the centerpieces together and they nailed it. Colors matched the party theme exactly. Delivery was on time and the arrangements held up all night. Not cheap but worth it.

Flowers were fine but they switched out two varieties without telling me. Found out when the centerpieces showed up. They fixed it last minute but I shouldn't have had to chase them. Would try someone else first.
Great for smaller orders. Worked with them on a Dia de los Muertos altar arrangement — they knew exactly what marigold varieties I wanted. Good price.
Location is convenient and price is lower than the competition. But the sound system cut out twice during the first event I hosted here. Staff was apologetic but still.
Not going back. AC barely worked, two restrooms were out of service by 8pm, and the coordinator didn't respond to texts day-of. Save yourself the stress.
Used them for a Quince and the setup crew was on time and professional. Would book again.
Solid vendor. Communication could be faster but the work held up all night.
Reliable for bulk event orders. Prices are fair if you buy ahead.
Good selection. Parking gets tight but the staff knows what they're doing.
Decent but I had to follow up twice to confirm my order. Ended up fine.
Best in town for what I need. Quality is consistent event after event.
Went here scouting catering for a client. Food was genuinely good.
Hardware store staff actually knew where things were. Rare and appreciated.
Ordered flowers and the tones were off from what we agreed. Made it work but disappointed.
Grabbed clearance ribbon and it became three centerpieces. Great finds here.
